description: A maintenance planner manages the program for rebuilding major components (like haul truck engines) to be swapped into the fleet.

nodes.task_description: Review the forward forecast of component change-outs to determine how many rebuilt engines will be needed in the next six months.

expected_outcome.value: The forecast shows a need for four rebuilt engines.

nodes.task_description: Check the current inventory of rebuilt engines in the warehouse.

expected_outcome.value: The system shows only one rebuilt engine is currently in stock.

nodes.task_description: Issue work orders to the workshop to rebuild three used engines that are waiting to be repaired.

expected_outcome.value: Work orders are created to rebuild the components, ensuring a sufficient supply of rotables for the fleet.
